response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience across languages and domains, the candidate shows minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate) expertise — critical for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks, with only a brief, unelaborated mention of Java in past roles, lacking any demonstrable IDE tooling, language server, or build tool integration experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience building developer tooling and open-source projects
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem expertise
Lacks demonstrable experience with IDE internals or JVM tooling
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang) is misaligned with core role requirements
